doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and paralegals cannot provide legal services to clients even under supervision without constituting unauthorized practice of law under C
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP certification" program, and paralegals cannot provide legal services to clients even under supervision without constituting unauthorized practice of law under California Business & Professions Code §6125.
